title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: The decision layer for personal AI. Local-first runtime where agents automate across GitHub, Slack, Gmail & 45+ services — but every risky action stops for your yes, workers earn autonomy from track record, and every decision leaves a receipt. Your models, your machine, your policy. Includes an MCP bridge: 177 IDE tools for Claude Code.

title: r3dbars/nightshift
summary: Put your idle AI hardware to work while you sleep. Overnight, your machines scan the repo, draft safe work, and hand you a ranked morning brief. Drafts, not deploys. Local-first, MIT.

title: supernovae-st/nika
summary: Intent as Code | the workflow language for AI. One file, 4 verbs, one Rust binary. Local-first, any model, AGPL-3.0. 🦋

title: VeridonNetzwerk/Nox
summary: Local AI Desktop Assistant for Windows. Voice-enabled, 100% offline, open source. Powered by Ollama (Gemma 4), faster-whisper, Edge TTS, Kokoro & openWakeWord.

title: felixapel/CWA-eBook-Translate-Plugin
summary: Bilingual reading for Calibre-Web-Automated - translate ebooks paragraph-by-paragraph as you read, in 100+ languages, with local LLMs (Gemma 4 via Ollama/vLLM/LM Studio) or any cloud API. One-container install, zero CWA modifications.

title: lachydotmcg/metis-orchestrator
summary: Local-first AI orchestration studio. Route every task to the best-suited model, local or cloud. BYO keys or OpenRouter, free.

title: M2253510/QResponder
summary: Automate vendor security questionnaire responses using your private knowledge base with this local-first, self-hosted tool.

title: bethinamacrocephalic696/AI-Text-Processing-Assistant
summary: Automate text analysis and structured data extraction using local LLMs, custom prompt engineering, and production workflows.

title: raffaelefarinaro/ciaobot
summary: Ciaobot is an opinionated interface for using Claude Code and/or Codex as a personal assistant and second brain. It is a local web app around agentic work: chats, projects, files, schedules, memory, and archived knowledge all live in one interface instead of being scattered across terminal sessions.

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: SvenjaBorgwardt/gemmpen-teacher
summary: Offline AI helper for teachers: reads handwritten student work, marks it against your own criteria, and drafts feedback you review. Runs entirely on your computer, no cloud, no account.

title: 0xKoru/flujo
summary: Open-source local voice dictation - hold a key, speak, clean text lands in any app. Whisper + Ollama, 100% offline.

title: AliakbarB/simple-chatbot
summary: A conversational AI chatbot built with Python, Streamlit, and Ollama featuring persistent conversation memory.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: Abdullah1dev/agentic-ai-chatbot-langgraph
summary: An Agentic AI Chatbot built with LangGraph, LangChain, and Streamlit that intelligently decides when to answer using an LLM or retrieve information from user-uploaded PDF documents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). The project uses FAISS and Hugging Face Embeddings for semantic search, integrates LangSmith for tracing and debugging, and s

title: Maureenebimestrial715/claude-code-deepseek
summary: Install Claude Code on your machine with one click to use DeepSeek models via domestic mirrors without needing a VPN.

title: tonkonozhenko-mi/ai_private_workspace
summary: Local-first desktop app (macOS & Windows) to chat with your own projects — offline RAG over your files, grounded answers with sources. No cloud, no accounts.

title: fivepanelhat/AquaGuard-Portal
summary: Water & aquaculture domain portal in the Kiwi Edge architecture — offline sensor→guard→plan→actuate loop on Core SDK, MQTT, and RPi 5 16GB + Hailo-10H.

title: Merrymak3r/wow-llm-personas
summary: Give your CMaNGOS/playerbots AI companions real personalities with a local LLM — a tiny, dependency-free Python shim over Ollama. Per-bot personas, memory, and bot-to-bot banter, fully offline.
